summary: Wave 1: Provider Adapter Framework - Foundation for automated model management protocol

details.adapter_interface: Unified interface for all provider adapters with methods: list(), get(id), normalize(raw), getCapabilities(model)
details.base_adapter: Abstract base class with error handling, request timeout, retry logic, normalized errors, and circuit breaker hooks
details.provider_adapters: 6 production-ready adapters: OpenAI, Anthropic, Google/Gemini, Groq, Cerebras, NVIDIA
details.test_coverage: 155 tests, 282 assertions, all passing - comprehensive coverage for all adapters
details.normalized_schema: Consistent model schema across all providers for seamless switching
details.stateless_design: Adapters remain stateless, no provider-specific logic or caching at this layer
details.next_wave: Wave 2 will add Discovery Engine & Caching layer
